trigger: Owner direction to examine the graph repository N29 and N30 experiments thoroughly for mechanisms relevant to P2-I3 before closing I01.
audit_questions: Which N29 or N30 runtime, producer, carrier, trace, pressure, persistence, decay, reinforcement, relocation, replay, and control mechanisms are relevant to the P2-I3 causal kernel?
Which mechanisms call current public PyGRC surfaces, which remain experiment-local constructions, and which are evidence or interpretation only?
Which mechanisms alter the existing capability or operation dispositions, and which instead become bounded I02/I03 alternatives or warnings?
What exact experiment files and retained outputs support each finding?
evidence_effect: Source-current experiment-mechanism audit only. Experiment-local scripts and outputs cannot upgrade a public PyGRC capability to native, cannot be admitted automatically, and provide no P2-I3 scientific evidence.

classification_boundary.public_pygrc_surface: May affect a native capability disposition only when the mechanism resolves to a qualifying public surface at the frozen graph revision.
classification_boundary.experiment_local_mechanism: May become an I02/I03 constructed or producer-assisted alternative, with its original claim limits retained.
classification_boundary.retained_experiment_evidence: May establish what N29/N30 executed or classified, but not what P2-I3 has executed.
classification_boundary.interpretive_or_debt_record: May guide demand extraction but cannot establish runtime adequacy.

allowed_activity: Read-only filename and term searches over the added tracked paths.
Read-only inspection of plans, checklists, hypotheses, reports, scripts, configs, and retained JSON outputs.
Exact SHA-256 binding of every added file cited in the final I01 package.
Targeted static reconstruction of mechanism ownership and public-call paths without executing an N29/N30 candidate.
prohibited_activity: Writing to or rerunning either external experiment.
Treating an experiment-local producer, fixture, adapter, or derived artifact as a native PyGRC surface.
Selecting the P2-I3 carrier, dynamic, equation, response, or realization.
Using N29/N30 outcomes as P2-I3 candidate, calibration, registration, or scientific evidence.
required_outputs: A machine-readable N29/N30 mechanism inventory with exact ownership and relevance dispositions.
Exact added source digests and command provenance.
A narrative audit section stating what changes and what does not change in I01.
rerun_scope: No existing candidate or scientific run. Revalidate the expanded I01 matrices, digests, narrative, provenance, quarantine, and external-checkout integrity after the read-only examination.
